gauge.name: Neches River near Diboll

impacts.statement: Severe lowland flooding occurs. Some secondary roadways adjacent to the river are closed.
Lowland flooding will continue for several days. Ranchers should evacuate livestock and equipment near the river to higher ground.
Expect numerous flooded paths and secondary roadways next to the river.  Move livestock and equipment to higher ground.
Lowland flooding will slowly decrease for the next several days.
Minor lowland flooding of boat ramps, paths, and trails.  Move livestock and equipment to higher ground.
Minor lowland flooding occurs.  Expect flooded boat ramps and trails.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
